Let me zoom in more specifically on 2010 to confirm.

Now I can clearly see the bars for 2010, 2011, and 2012. The bars in 2010 extend the deepest, meaning 2010 had the highest fatalities. The bars for 2010 are visually the longest compared to 2011 and 2012.
